title: Chief Cognitive Systems Officer
summary: The Chief Cognitive Systems Officer keeps the thinking behind ICOS clear, usable, and grounded as the product grows.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role shapes the concepts, language, and cognitive frameworks that help ICOS remain understandable, useful, and responsible.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Keep Neuroartan’s cognitive systems clear, practical, and honest — so ICOS can explain what it does, why it matters, and how it supports human thought.
